current_phase: Wave 5 Complete + opencode-core V2 API Phase 1

memories.content: Wave 4 Day 15 COMPLETE: 4 k6 load tests passed, 0% error rate, 139,208 total requests. Go/No-Go: GO for Wave 5. Key fixes: DB schema (uploaded_at), API routing (file_search before files), k6 JSON headers.

DB schema consolidated in initialize_db (main.rs). Migration system disabled (db::init_database commented out). files table uses 'uploaded_at' NOT 'created_at'. file_search must be registered before files in mod.rs to avoid /files/{id} route collision.
memories.context: Critical bug fixes for Wave 4 Day 15 tests

memories.content: Git remote changed to SSH: git@github.com:HHKK0127/Opencode_Rs.git. HTTPS push fails due to connection reset. GitHub CLI uses SSH protocol.

Wave 5 plan: Phase 1 (Day 16-17, 9 tests) Redis+logging, Phase 2 (Day 18-19, 6 tests) Docker+CI/CD, Phase 3 (Day 20-21, 6 tests) Canary release, Phase 4 (Day 22-23, 210 smoke) final migration. Doc: docs/Planning/WAVE5_DETAILED_PLAN.md

Redis cache: Cache-Aside + Write-Through. TTLs: metadata 1h, list 30m, search 30m. Session: session:{token} key, 24h TTL. Graceful degradation when Redis down. Container: opencode-redis:6379, pw: test_password.

Working endpoints: POST /api/v1/auth/login (200), GET /api/v1/files?page=1&per_page=20 (200), GET /health (200). /files/search returns 404 due to routing conflict with /files/{id} - workaround: use /files list endpoint for caching tests.

opencode-core: OpenCode v2 API Phase 1 complete. 13 endpoints implemented (SSE, session CRUD, prompt, question, permission). Frontend built: Vite+React+assistant-ui. Server starts and health endpoint works. BUG: POST /api/session/{id}/prompt crashes server (HTTP 000). Need to debug prompt handler.

opencode-core: EventBus = tokio::sync::broadcast(2048). SessionStore = Arc<RwLock<HashMap<String,SessionData>>>. Mock LLM uses tokio::spawn async background. Auth = Basic Auth (auto UUID pwd). Dev password: opencode.

Frontend: Vite 4 + React 18 + TypeScript. Dependencies: @assistant-ui/react, @assistant-ui/react-opencode, @opencode-ai/sdk. Entry: opencode-desktop/. Build: npm run build => dist/ served by Rust backend.
